summary: internal/cli sync and search handling now recognizes Airflow list envelopes such as dags, dag_runs, task_instances, pools, variables, and connections, including empty arrays.
reason: Airflow API list responses are resource-named envelopes with total_entries metadata. The generated generic extractor handled data/results/items but treated Airflow envelopes as single objects, so sync dropped rows with missing IDs and search filtered DAG rows that use dag_id/task_id instead of id/name.
validated_outcome: Local Airflow 3.0.0 validation: sync --resources dags,pools stored four records with zero errors, and search validation returned the synced DAG and failed DAG-run rows from SQLite.
